remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document to a new file.

delete-all-annotations-from-pdfs.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
delete-all-annotations-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to loop through a directory of PDF files, bind each with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, remove all annotations, and overwrite the original files.

delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.title: Delete Text Annotations from PDF
delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove only text (sticky note) annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

remove-link-annotations-from-specific-pd.title: Remove Link Annotations from Specific PDF Pages
remove-link-annotations-from-specific-pd.description: Shows how to delete all link annotations on pages 3 through 7 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

delete-specific-annotation-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Annotation from PDF
delete-specific-annotation-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove a single annotation identified by its Name property ("Comment1") from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name
delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.description: Shows how to remove a specific annotation from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfAnnotationEditor by providing the annotation's name.

export-all-annotations-from-a-pdf-to-an-.title: Export All Annotations From A Pdf To An Xfdf File By Invoking Exportannotations With A File Stream Destination

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Memory Stream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with annotations, then export the annotations from specific pages to an XFDF format using a memory stream for further processing.

export-highlight-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Highlight Annotations to XFDF
export-highlight-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to filter PDF annotations to only highlights and export them to an XFDF file using the PdfAnnotationEditor overload.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from an XFDF file, and save the updated PDF.

import-xfdf-annotations-to-specific-page.title: Import XFDF Annotations to Specific PDF Pages
import-xfdf-annotations-to-specific-page.description: Shows how to import annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF and retain them only on a defined page range by using PdfAnnotationEditor and removing unwanted annotations.

import-annotations-without-overwrite.title: Import Annotations Without Overwriting Existing Ones
import-annotations-without-overwrite.description: Shows how to import annotations from one or more source PDFs into a target PDF while preserving any existing annotations by disabling the overwrite option.

flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Flatten PDF Annotations
flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, flattens all annotations into non‑editable visual elements, and saves the resulting document.

flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.title: Flatten Annotations on First Five PDF Pages
flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.description: Shows how to flatten all types of annotations on pages 1‑5 of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

modify-annotation-author-on-pdf-page.title: Modify Annotation Author on Specific PDF Page
modify-annotation-author-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace the author of annotations on a given PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

change-annotation-subject-color.title: Change Annotation Subject and Color
change-annotation-subject-color.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Subject and Color of an existing PDF annotation by creating a new TextAnnotation and applying it with ModifyAnnotations.

set-annotation-open-flag.title: Set Annotation Open Flag for All PDF Annotations
set-annotation-open-flag.description: Shows how to iterate through every page of a PDF and set the Open property of text and popup annotations to true using Aspose.Pdf.

update-annotation-modified-date.title: Update Annotation Modified Date in PDF
update-annotation-modified-date.description: Shows how to set a TextAnnotation's Modified property to the current system time and apply the change to all pages using PdfAnnotationEditor.

set-readonly-flag-on-pdf-annotation.title: Set Read‑Only Flag on PDF Annotation
set-readonly-flag-on-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates extracting a text annotation, setting its ReadOnly flag, and applying the change with PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

batch-update-annotation-author.title: Batch Update Annotation Author in Multiple PDFs
batch-update-annotation-author.description: Demonstrates how to loop through a folder of PDF files and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to replace the author of all annotations with a new value, saving the updated PDFs.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array via MemoryStream, export all its annotations to an XFDF stream, and return the XFDF data as a byte array.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF from Streams
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a FileStream, import annotations from an XFDF stream, and save the updated PDF without creating temporary files using Aspose.Pdf.

fluent-pdf-annotation-delete-flatten.title: Fluent Workflow for Deleting and Flattening PDF Annotations
fluent-pdf-annotation-delete-flatten.description: Shows a fluent wrapper around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor that binds a PDF, deletes all annotations, flattens remaining ones, and saves the file in a single method chain. Also creates a sample PDF with a text annotation for demonstration.

validate-exported-xfdf-against-the-xfdf-.title: Validate Exported Xfdf Against The Xfdf Schema By Loading The File Into An Xml Document And Checking Errors

delete-annotations-and-verify-count.title: Delete All Annotations and Verify Count
delete-annotations-and-verify-count.description: The example counts annotations in a PDF, removes all of them using PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the cleaned file, and then recounts to confirm the deletion.

extract-pdf-annotation-details.title: Extract PDF Annotation Details to Custom DTO
extract-pdf-annotation-details.description: Shows how to load a PDF, extract all annotations with PdfAnnotationEditor, and map each annotation's name, type, and rectangle into a custom C# data transfer object.

export-pdf-annotations-to-json.title: Export PDF Annotations to JSON Log
export-pdf-annotations-to-json.description: The example loads a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor, iterates through each page and its annotations, extracts key annotation properties, and writes the collected data as indented JSON to an audit log file.

delete-pdf-annotation-with-error-handlin.title: Delete PDF Annotation with Error Handling
delete-pdf-annotation-with-error-handlin.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and gracefully handle errors when the annotation does not exist.

delete-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Author Name
delete-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: Shows how to filter annotations in a PDF by the author (Title) and remove them using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

delete-annotations-by-rgb-color.title: Delete Annotations by Specific RGB Color
delete-annotations-by-rgb-color.description: Demonstrates how to remove PDF annotations whose Color property matches a given RGB value using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import that XFDF into another PDF to duplicate the annotation layout.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Iterates through all PDF files in a directory and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten annotations, saving each result with a _flattened suffix.

batch-delete-stamp-annotations.title: Batch Delete Stamp Annotations from PDFs
batch-delete-stamp-annotations.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory and remove all stamp annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Shows how to load a single XFDF file with reviewer comments and apply those annotations to several PDF documents, saving each annotated PDF with a new name.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdfs-in-para.title: Remove All Annotations from PDFs in Parallel
remove-all-annotations-from-pdfs-in-para.description: Demonstrates how to delete every annotation from a collection of PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor while processing the files concurrently with Parallel.ForEach to speed up execution.

flatten-pdf-annotations-measure-time.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Measure Execution Time
flatten-pdf-annotations-measure-time.description: Loads a 500‑page PDF, flattens all annotations using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, saves the result, and reports the time taken to perform the operation.

list-annotation-names-pdf-annotation-edi.title: List Annotation Names in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor
list-annotation-names-pdf-annotation-edi.description: Shows how to add a named text annotation to a PDF, then load the file with PdfAnnotationEditor and enumerate all annotation names, printing them to the console for debugging.

delete-annotations-pdf-annotation-editor.title: Delete All Annotations from PDF Using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-annotations-pdf-annotation-editor.description: The example creates a PDF with two text annotations, uses PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotations to remove them, and verifies the removal with a unit test.

delete-pdf-annotation-with-retry.title: Delete PDF Annotation with Retry Mechanism
delete-pdf-annotation-with-retry.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with a retry mechanism that rebinds the document if the first attempt fails.

delete-annotations-and-log-to-json.title: Delete All Annotations and Log Deletions to JSON
delete-annotations-and-log-to-json.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through every page, deletes each annotation, and writes a JSON log entry containing the annotation's name, type, and page number. The cleaned PDF is then saved.

delete-specific-annotation-types-from-pd.title: Delete Specific Annotation Types from PDF Using Configuration
delete-specific-annotation-types-from-pd.description: Shows how to read a JSON file that lists annotation types and delete those annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-delete-pdf-annotations-with-progre.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations with Progress Display
batch-delete-pdf-annotations-with-progre.description: Shows how to remove all annotations from multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor while reporting the processing percentage in the console.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-cancellati.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Cancellation Support
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-cancellati.description: Demonstrates how to flatten annotations in multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor while supporting user‑initiated cancellation via a CancellationToken.

get-annotation-names-by-author.title: Get Annotation Names by Author from PDF
get-annotation-names-by-author.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to iterate through PDF pages and annotations, filtering by the annotation's author (Subject) and returning their names.

copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Copy Annotations from Template PDF to Multiple PDFs
copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to export annotations from a template PDF to an XFDF stream and import them into several target PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-pdf-annotations-validate.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
flatten-pdf-annotations-validate.description: The example flattens all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then checks each page to ensure no annotation objects remain.

batch-remove-annotations-report.title: Batch Remove Annotations from PDFs and Generate Report
batch-remove-annotations-report.description: The example counts all annotations in each PDF, removes them using PdfAnnotationEditor, saves a cleaned copy, and prints a per‑file removal summary.

pdf-annotation-helper.title: PDF Annotation Helper for Deleting, Flattening, and Saving
pdf-annotation-helper.description: Demonstrates a reusable C# helper that binds to a PDF, deletes or flattens annotations, and saves the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-pdf-annotations.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF Stream
remove-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a stream, delete every annotation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and return the cleaned PDF as a MemoryStream.

async-pdf-annotation-operations.title: Asynchronous PDF Annotation Operations with PdfAnnotationEditor
async-pdf-annotation-operations.description: Shows how to perform annotation tasks such as flattening, deleting, importing, and exporting on a PDF asynchronously by wrapping PdfAnnotationEditor calls in Task.Run.

delete-annotations-from-pdfs.title: Delete Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
delete-annotations-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files in a directory, removing all annotations using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor and saving the cleaned PDFs to an output folder.

log-annotation-modified-timestamp.title: Log and Update Annotation Modified Timestamps
log-annotation-modified-timestamp.description: Shows how to assign a Modified timestamp to all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then log each annotation's name and its timestamp.

backup-pdf-delete-all-annotations.title: Backup PDF and Delete All Annotations
backup-pdf-delete-all-annotations.description: Creates a backup copy of the original PDF and then removes every annotation using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, saving the cleaned document to a new file.

delete-pdf-annotation-by-name__v2.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name (Literal and Variable)
delete-pdf-annotation-by-name__v2.description: Demonstrates removing a named annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor, with examples of using a string literal and a variable for the annotation name.

benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.title: Benchmark DeleteAnnotations vs DeleteAnnotation
benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.description: Shows how to measure the performance of deleting all PDF annotations at once versus deleting a single annotation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log Size Reduction
flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then record the original and flattened file sizes to calculate the size reduction for audit purposes.

extract-annotation-rectangles.title: Extract Annotation Rectangles and Create Visual PDF
extract-annotation-rectangles.description: Shows how to read annotation rectangles from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and generate a new PDF where each annotation is visualized as a red rectangle on its own page.

add-text-annotation-with-custom-flags.title: Add Text Annotation with Custom Flags
add-text-annotation-with-custom-flags.description: Shows how to create a TextAnnotation, set custom annotation flags, and apply it to specific pages using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

flatten-annotations-on-network-share.title: Flatten Annotations in PDFs on a Network Share
flatten-annotations-on-network-share.description: Demonstrates how to scan a UNC network share for PDF files, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, and overwrite the original documents, suitable for nightly scheduling.

validate-no-annotations-after-flattening.title: Validate No Annotations Remain After Flattening PDF
validate-no-annotations-after-flattening.description: Loads a PDF, flattens all annotations with PdfAnnotationEditor, scans each page to verify no annotation objects remain, and saves the flattened document.

export-pdf-annotations-to-pretty-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to Pretty‑Printed XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-pretty-xfdf.description: Shows how to extract annotations from a PDF and save them as an indented XFDF file for easy manual editing using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-annotation-utility-delete-flatten-ex.title: PDF Annotation Utility (Delete, Flatten, Export)
pdf-annotation-utility-delete-flatten-ex.description: Demonstrates a command‑line tool that uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades to delete specific pages, flatten all annotations, or export annotations to an XFDF file.

export-annotations-to-xfdf-no-annotation.title: Export Annotations to XFDF When PDF Has No Annotations
export-annotations-to-xfdf-no-annotation.description: Demonstrates creating a blank PDF, binding it to PdfAnnotationEditor, exporting annotations to an XFDF stream, and asserting the output contains the root <xfdf> element even when there are no annotations.

merge-multiple-xfdf-into-pdf.title: Merge Multiple XFDF Files and Import into PDF
merge-multiple-xfdf-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to combine several XFDF files into a single XFDF document and import the merged form fields and annotations into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

log-annotation-workflow.title: Verbose Annotation Workflow Logging
log-annotation-workflow.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, inspect each annotation, log detailed diagnostic information, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.title: Retrieve Annotation Count per PDF Page
retrieve-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor to iterate through each page of a PDF, extract all annotations, and return a dictionary mapping page numbers to their annotation counts.

clone-modify-pdf-annotation.title: Clone and Modify PDF Annotation
clone-modify-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to clone an existing annotation on a PDF page, modify its properties, add the cloned annotation back to the same page, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into Matching PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDFs, locate corresponding XFDF files by name, import the annotations using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated PDFs to an output folder.

concurrent-insert-delete-pdf.title: Concurrent Insert and Delete Operations on PDF
concurrent-insert-delete-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to run page insertion and page deletion on the same PDF simultaneously using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and .NET tasks to test thread safety.

backup-and-flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Backup and Flatten PDF Form Fields
backup-and-flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to create a backup of a PDF file and then flatten all form fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to prevent data loss.

count-pdf-annotations-by-type.title: Count PDF Annotations by Type
count-pdf-annotations-by-type.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, extract all annotations using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, and return a dictionary that maps each annotation type to its occurrence count.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-skip-reado.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Read‑Only Skip
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-skip-reado.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all pages and annotations in a PDF, flatten each annotation, and optionally skip those marked as read‑only using a configuration flag.

annotation-performance-logger.title: Log Annotation Operation Durations in PDF
annotation-performance-logger.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to add, flatten, and save PDF annotations while measuring and logging the execution time of each operation.

delete-annotations-export-xfdf.title: Delete Specific Annotations and Export Remaining to XFDF
delete-annotations-export-xfdf.description: Shows how to remove all annotations of a given type from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then export the remaining annotations to an XFDF file.

retry-annotation-modification-exponentia.title: Retry Annotation Modification with Exponential Backoff
retry-annotation-modification-exponentia.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF annotations using Aspose.Pdf while applying a retry policy with exponential backoff to handle transient I/O errors.

list-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: List PDF Annotations with Page Numbers to CSV
list-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: Shows how to extract annotation names and their corresponding page numbers from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write the results to a CSV file.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf-annotation.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF Annotation
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextAnnotation, extend its dictionary with custom metadata, modify it using PdfAnnotationEditor, and add document‑level metadata with PdfFileInfo before saving the PDF.

remove-old-annotations-from-pdf.title: Batch Remove Old Annotations from PDF
remove-old-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and annotations, and delete any annotation whose Modified date is older than a given number of days, then save the cleaned document.

check-duplicate-annotation-names.title: Check for Duplicate Annotation Names in a PDF
check-duplicate-annotation-names.description: Shows how to traverse all annotations in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, detect duplicate annotation names, and write a conflict report to a log file.

extract-pdf-annotations-summary.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Create a Summary Document
extract-pdf-annotations-summary.description: The example reads all textual annotations from an input PDF, aggregates their contents, and generates a new PDF containing a compiled summary of those comments.

flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Static Graphics
flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.description: Shows how to convert interactive PDF annotations into static graphics while preserving their visual appearance using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

merge-annotation-layers.title: Merge Annotation Layers from Multiple PDFs
merge-annotation-layers.description: Shows how to import annotation layers from several source PDFs into a target PDF and save the combined result using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

pdfannotationeditor-health-check.title: Health Check for PdfAnnotationEditor Binding
pdfannotationeditor-health-check.description: Demonstrates a simple health‑check that verifies the PdfAnnotationEditor facade can bind to a PDF file without throwing exceptions.

batch-export-delete-pdf-annotations.title: Batch Export and Delete PDF Annotations to XFDF
batch-export-delete-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files, export all annotations to XFDF, remove the annotations, and save the cleaned PDFs while archiving the XFDF files.

flatten-pdf-save-custom-output.title: Flatten PDF and Save to Custom Output Directory
flatten-pdf-save-custom-output.description: Demonstrates how to flatten a PDF (removing form fields) and save the resulting file to a user‑specified output folder using Aspose.Pdf.

log-file-sizes-after-flattening-pdf-anno.title: Log File Sizes After Flattening PDF Annotations
log-file-sizes-after-flattening-pdf-anno.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and log the original and resulting file sizes for audit purposes.

modify-annotation-subject-unit-test.title: Unit Test for Updating PDF Annotation Subject
modify-annotation-subject-unit-test.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a TextAnnotation, using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations to change its Subject property, and verifying the update with an NUnit test.

batch-delete-pdf-annotations.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations Using Retention Config
batch-delete-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to load a JSON configuration that lists annotation types to keep, then removes all other annotation types from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.title: Flatten PDF Annotations from a Stream
flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF provided as a stream and return the modified PDF in a MemoryStream, avoiding any disk I/O.

flatten-pdf-tag-flatten-date.title: Flatten PDF and Tag with Flatten Date Metadata
flatten-pdf-tag-flatten-date.description: Shows how to flatten a PDF (remove interactive form fields) and add a custom metadata entry that records the flattening date using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-with-log.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Diagnostic Logging
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-with-log.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and simultaneously write the same XFDF content to a diagnostic log file.

clone-annotation-change-color.title: Clone PDF Annotation, Change Its Color, and Add to Another Page
clone-annotation-change-color.description: Demonstrates how to extract a specific annotation from one page, clone it with a new color, and place the cloned annotation on a different page using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-process-pdfs-azure-blob-pdfannotat.title: Batch Process PDFs from Azure Blob Storage with PdfAnnotationEditor
batch-process-pdfs-azure-blob-pdfannotat.description: Streams PDF files from an Azure Blob Storage container, uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete all annotations, and uploads the edited PDFs to another container.

generate-annotation-summary-report.title: Generate Annotation Summary Report for PDFs
generate-annotation-summary-report.description: Shows how to enumerate all annotations in one or more PDF files, count each annotation type, and write a summary report. It also demonstrates using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade to load and optionally save PDFs.

conditional-pdf-flattening-based-on-digi.title: Conditional PDF Flattening Based on Digital Signatures
conditional-pdf-flattening-based-on-digi.description: The example checks whether a PDF contains digital signatures and skips flattening to preserve signature validity; otherwise it flattens form fields and annotations.

rename-pdf-annotations-with-standard-pre.title: Rename PDF Annotations with Standard Prefix
rename-pdf-annotations-with-standard-pre.description: Shows how to batch rename annotation names in a PDF by adding a standardized prefix using the Aspose.Pdf PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

flatten-delete-pdf-annotations-verbose.title: Flatten and Delete PDF Annotations with Verbose Logging
flatten-delete-pdf-annotations-verbose.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, export its annotations to XFDF, flatten and delete all annotations, and save the modified file, with an optional --verbose flag for detailed operation logging.

test-export-annotations-unbound-pdfannot.title: Test ExportAnnotations on Unbound PdfAnnotationEditor
test-export-annotations-unbound-pdfannot.description: Demonstrates how to verify that calling ExportAnnotationsToXfdf on a PdfAnnotationEditor that hasn't been bound to a PDF throws an exception.

report-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Report PDF Annotations Grouped by Author
report-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF, group them by the author (Title property of markup annotations), and output a simple console report.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-custom-na.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Custom Namespace
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-custom-na.description: Demonstrates exporting annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and replacing the default XFDF namespace with a custom one required by enterprise XML standards.

pdf-annotation-flattening-service.title: Folder Watcher to Flatten PDF Annotations
pdf-annotation-flattening-service.description: Demonstrates a background service that watches a directory for new PDF files and uses Aspose.Pdf to flatten all annotations in each document automatically.

validate-pdf-integrity-after-annotation-.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Annotation Changes
validate-pdf-integrity-after-annotation-.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade to validate a PDF's structural integrity after annotation modifications, writing a validation log and handling corrupted object exceptions.

export-annotations-xfdf-gzip.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and GZip Compress
export-annotations-xfdf-gzip.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF, export them to an XFDF stream, and compress the result using GZip for efficient storage.

import-xfdf-into-pdf-cleanup.title: Import XFDF into PDF and Clean Up Temporary File
import-xfdf-into-pdf-cleanup.description: Demonstrates how to import XFDF data into a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf Form facade and then delete the temporary XFDF file after a successful import.

pdf-annotation-helper__v2.title: PDF Annotation Helper for Adding and Deleting Annotations
pdf-annotation-helper__v2.description: Demonstrates a wrapper class that abstracts Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add text (sticky‑note) annotations, delete specific or all annotations, and save the modified PDF.
